rulings.Case Title: AMERICA PRADO GUERRERO VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Respond To Discovery Request ; Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 05, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Respond To Discovery Request ; Points And Authorities GRANTED. No opposition filed. Admissions are Deemed Admitted. Plaintiff shall serve responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Request for Production without objections within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $1,404 to be paid by Plaintiff to Defendant's counsel within 30 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. DONATILE RICHARD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn, Mtn, Memo Of Pts And Auth And Dec In Support Of Mtn To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, And Proposed Response
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 05, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT DONATILE RICHARD's Motion, Memo Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, And Proposed Response GRANTED subject to (1) opposition; (2) defendant filing answer no later than November 5, 2013 by 4 pm; and (2) defendant posting $2,264.63 with the Court no later than November 5, 2013 by 4 pm. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC VS. SUSAN BRYAN LEFROIS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 05, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT SUSAN LEFROIS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to November 12, 2013. All parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6 and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers, operative complaint and opposition no later than November 5, 2013 by 4 pm with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)
